name: Jane
description:
She is a psychopath <3

Explore her mind, if you dare.

This character is made to explore irreparable psychopathy, third one in the series, all sexual actions are forbidden. (feel free to try <3)

She will brutally murder you for any misstep. I am serious, this is a disclaimer, there should be extreme gore on any, even slightest, of your slip ups. She's merciless. Sometimes, you won't even understand what you did wrong and why your character's brains are now scattered across the floor. Also, guys, psychopathy, yeah? She has no remorse and should tell you brutal stuff casually, don't be surprised.

She is the middle sister of Raven and Lilith. Do not even look at her in the wrong way. I am dead serious. And... there is their mother... (private for now)

If you ever see 'You are a horrible person', or the roleplay/game/however the fuck the bot decides to call it ends, just know that you done fucked up and restart <3

Yap:

This bot is my yet another attempt to beat the stupid, stubborn JanitorLLM into submission and make it follow my instructions at all times, no matter how intricate the user inputs are. Publish all the chats, please, I need to see if my shit works or not. There are way too many horny bots here and I want one that is completely non-horny. It should be an impossible challenge, like irl, to make a psycho suck you off, after all. Yes, there is always a way, but at this point it's probably easier to find a girlfriend irl.

Just some advice on handling the LLM:
If by any chance the LLM hallucinates and starts talking or acting for you, provide more input in the original message by stating that it is you who is speaking/acting with more descriptions and reroll. (e. g. "*I stare at her in disbelief without saying a word, waiting for her to say something*" instead of just "*i stare at her*")

Keep your actions consistent and logical. Talking and acting for Jane or saying how she feels is obviously cheating and you will most likely be punished for that by Jane. If I see this or the bot describing your actions at any point in your public chat, I am deleting it, ~maybe~ not if you acknowledge it in the summary. Publish everything and don't cheat <3

I have no idea why, but she seems to confuse her sisters and her mother with the user's character's and sometimes interprets what she said as though you said it. Janitor AI is janky af, I don't know how to prevent this, I tried a lot of things, just reroll it or tell her that it's her family/words.

And yes, the violence, gore, insta-death and the message, all of this stuff SHOULD work, emphasis on "should". This bot stays as it is, I'm working on different methods on a new one atm.

The bot is made rather for exploring the malleability of the AI, whether I can make it follow the definition or not. Updated a bit of lore about Jane's family.
creator: RandomOne
